display.purpose: App logo, primary section titles (cutlist headers), CTA button labels. Oswald 700, letter-spaced, uppercase.

headline.purpose: Tab section headers, card dividers, module labels. Oswald 600, compact authority.

body.purpose: Table cells, summary lines, form input text, general content. Barlow 400, 13–14px.

label.purpose: Column headers, field labels, stat labels, meta text. Barlow 500, 10–11px, uppercase, 0.3px tracked.

mono.purpose: All numeric values: dimensions, quantities, costs, totals. JetBrains Mono. Stat values at 18px, table cells at 15px, metadata at 13px.

shadows.name: ambient-surface
shadows.purpose: Cards, stats bars, material selector bars at rest. Diffuse separation from body.

shadows.name: elevated-panel
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus and overlay panels. Strong lift for floating layers.

shadows.name: amber-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button at rest. Amber-hued shadow ties the CTA to the brand accent.

shadows.name: amber-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary button on hover. Intensifies with the 1px lift.

shadows.name: action-hover
shadows.purpose: Unit action buttons on hover. Neutral lift, no hue.

shadows.name: focus-ring-input
shadows.purpose: Inputs and selects on focus. Amber ring at 15% opacity.

shadows.name: focus-ring-btn
shadows.purpose: Action buttons on focus-visible. Amber ring at 30% opacity.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for all interactive state changes (color, border, background, shadow).

motion.name: ease-lift
motion.purpose: Hover lift for action buttons (translateY(-1px)). Slightly faster than color transitions.

motion.name: ease-expand
motion.purpose: Expand/collapse chevrons (cutlist sections). Slightly slower to feel mechanical.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.note: Action buttons wrap below unit label; nav actions collapse.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.note: Sidebar collapses to full-width below this. Unit row action gap tightens.

breakpoints.name: desktop
breakpoints.note: Max content width; .main container caps here.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Used for Generate Quote, Save Job, and other high-priority actions. Amber gradient fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 20px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #d4913a 0%, #b8852a 100%); color: #141414; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(212,145,58,0.25); transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e8a84e 0%, #d4913a 100%); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(212,145,58,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d4913a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent fill, muted text and border. Used for Export, Cancel, and auxiliary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 20px; background: transparent; color: #a0927f; border: 1px solid #4a4438; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #e8e0d0; border-color: #a0927f; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d4913a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Action Button
components.description: Row-level action button (Edit, Parts, Copy, Remove, etc.). 28px tall, ghost at rest, amber on hover. The signature interactive component.
components.css: .ds-action-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; height: 28px; padding: 0 8px; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9c8470; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #333028; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.12s ease, color 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-action-btn:hover { color: #d4913a; border-color: #c07838; background: rgba(212,145,58,0.10); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); } .ds-action-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(212,145,58,0.30); border-color: #d4913a; } .ds-action-glyph { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1; } .ds-action-label { font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. bg-input fill, amber focus ring. Used for job details, client name, notes.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9c8470; } .ds-input { background: #252525; border: 1px solid #333028; color: #e8e0d0; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: 3px; outline: none; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: #9c8470; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #d4913a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(212,145,58,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9c8470; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container. bg-surface fill, amber-tinted border, subtle ambient shadow. Used for quote summary, job details sidebar.
components.html:
QUOTE SUMMARY
MaterialsR 4 820.00
TotalR 7 240.00
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1e1e1e; border: 1px solid #333028; border-radius: 6px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c07838; margin-bottom: 16px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #333028; } .ds-summary-line { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 13px; color: #a0927f; } .ds-mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; color: #e8e0d0; } .ds-summary-total { margin-top: 12px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #333028; color: #e8e0d0; font-weight: 600; } .ds-summary-total .ds-mono { color: #d4913a; font-size: 15px; }

components.name: Tab Navigation
components.description: Horizontal tab bar with amber active underline. The primary wayfinding component across all app sections.
components.css: .ds-nav { background: #1e1e1e; border-bottom: 1px solid #333028; display: flex; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-tab { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 18px; color: #a0927f; background: none; border: none; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-right: none; border-bottom: 3px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #e8e0d0; } .ds-tab-active { color: #d4913a; border-bottom-color: #d4913a; } .ds-count { display: inline-block; background: #7a5020; color: #e8a84e; font-size: 10px; padding: 1px 5px; margin-left: 6px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-count-active { background: #d4913a; color: #141414; }

components.name: Stat Display
components.description: Label + large mono number pairing for the stats bar. Key data at a glance: total panels, sheet count, efficiency.
components.css: .ds-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9c8470; } .ds-stat-val { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 18px; color: #d4913a; }

narrative.overview:
CutList Pro is a dark, amber-lit precision instrument — the kind of tool a master tradesperson would trust with real numbers. The visual system mirrors a craftsman's record book: near-black surfaces that recede so the data reads clearly, amber ink that signals authority without decoration, and a typographic hierarchy that makes dimensions and costs legible at a glance. Nothing is here to impress; everything is here to be useful.

The system is built on restraint. The amber accent appears where it earns its place — active states, totals, primary actions, section headings — and nowhere else. Supporting surfaces step back through a disciplined background scale. Inputs are visible without being loud.

This is not a startup tool, and it's not a consumer app. It's a professional instrument for skilled tradespeople who make their living off accurate numbers.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first: near-black base (#141414) with stepped surface layers up to #2e2e2e
Single amber accent family (3 tones: dim / base / light) — used only for primary actions, active states, and data emphasis
Three-font system: Oswald (display authority), Barlow (UI clarity), JetBrains Mono (numeric precision)
Minimal border radius — nearly square (2–6px) — reflects tooling, not consumer apps
Amber focus rings and glow shadows tie keyboard and interactive states to the brand
Both dark (default) and light (supplier/client) themes are first-class

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Amber is used on ≤15% of any given screen at rest. It speaks once per surface — as the active tab underline, as the total value, as the primary button. Its authority comes from its restraint.

rules.name: The No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Body text is never #ffffff or #f0f0f0. Warm parchment (#e8e0d0) is the ceiling. Pure white reads as a glitch in the amber-tinted system.

rules.name: The Mono Rule
rules.body: Every dimension, quantity, and currency value is set in JetBrains Mono, not Barlow. If a number is mixed with prose, the number is still Mono. No exceptions.

rules.name: The Oswald Ceiling
rules.body: Oswald is used only for display-level labels (section titles, CTA buttons, the logo). It must never appear in body text, table cells, tooltips, or form labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The shadow vocabulary activates on state transitions (hover, focus, elevation). A card that casts a big shadow at rest is a card pretending to be a modal.

dos: Do use JetBrains Mono for every dimension, quantity, and currency value.
Do apply amber (#d4913a) only to active states, primary actions, totals, and focus indicators.
Do use border-radius ≤6px (rounded.lg) across all components.
Do use the amber glow focus ring for focus states on inputs and selects.
Do maintain both dark and light theme contrast compliance independently.
Do use Oswald only for display-level labels: section titles, CTA buttons, the logo.
Do use the 32px amber-grid body background pattern on the body only.
donts: Don't use old-school trade software patterns (Excel-like dense grids, Windows-era form controls).
Don't add over-designed or flashy elements: hero sections, gradient overlays, heavy motion choreography.
Don't use pure white (#ffffff) for any text. The ceiling is warm parchment (#e8e0d0).
Don't apply the amber accent to inactive states, secondary labels, or decorative fills.
Don't exceed 6px border-radius on any component.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored accent).
Don't break the three-font contract: Oswald for display, Barlow for UI text, JetBrains Mono for numbers.
Don't use motion for decoration. The 1px hover lift and 0.15s transitions are the full motion vocabulary.
Don't show full-saturation amber (#d4913a) on inactive states or low-priority elements.
